summary: Iteration 96 - Complete testing of GreenLink Agritech platform. All backend APIs (registration, SSRTE, REDD, farmer history) working correctly. Frontend Agent Terrain and Farmer dashboards fully functional with new progression badge feature.
seed_data_creation: Created test farmers via registration form during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 96 are working: 1) POST /api/ussd/register-web works for farmer registration, 2) POST /api/ici-data/ssrte/visit works for SSRTE visits (requires valid MongoDB ObjectId for farmer_id), 3) POST /api/redd/tracking/visit works for REDD tracking, 4) GET /api/ici-data/farmers/{farmer_id}/history returns farmer history, 5) Agent Terrain Inscrire tab works without 'Erreur reseau', 6) Farmer Plus tab shows new 'Ma Progression' badge with percentage and etapes count, 7) All 3 sections in Farmer Plus tab (Mes Activites, Marketplace & Primes, Mon Compte) are present.

frontend: Agent Terrain Inscrire tab - PASSED (no 'Erreur reseau')
Agent Terrain registration form submission - PASSED
Agent Terrain Plus tab with Outils Terrain and Mon Compte sections - PASSED
Farmer Accueil tab with carbon score and REDD widgets - PASSED
Farmer Plus tab with Ma Progression badge (17%, 1/6 etapes) - PASSED
Farmer Plus tab 3 sections (Mes Activites, Marketplace & Primes, Mon Compte) - PASSED
